prophecies.q: 第1条箴言：Ex castro Tiberis（来自台伯河的城堡）
prophecies.a:
教皇策肋定二世（Celestine II，1143-1144在位）。原名圭多·迪·卡斯特洛，出生于意大利翁布里亚的奇塔迪卡斯泰洛（Città di Castello），该城位于台伯河畔。
白话：箴言「来自台伯河的城堡」直接对应教皇的出生地——台伯河畔的城堡之城。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #1: Ex castro Tiberis (From a castle on the Tiber)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Celestine II (1143-1144). Born Guido di Castello, from Città di Castello in Umbria, Italy, a town on the banks of the Tiber River.
The motto 'From a castle on the Tiber' directly references the pope's birthplace — the Castle City on the Tiber.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 策肋定二世原名圭多·迪·卡斯特洛，出生于台伯河畔的奇塔迪卡斯泰洛，箴言与出生地精确吻合。但此条属于1595年之前的箴言，可能是事后编写。
prophecies.verdict_en: Celestine II was born Guido di Castello from Città di Castello on the Tiber. The motto matches precisely. However, this motto predates the 1595 publication and may have been composed after the fact.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第3条箴言：Ex magnitudine montis（来自大山的伟岸）
prophecies.a:
教皇尤金三世（Eugene III，1145-1153在位）。出生于意大利蒙特马尼奥（Montemagno），地名意为「大山」。他曾任比萨附近的三泉隐修院院长。
白话：箴言「来自大山的伟岸」对应教皇出生地蒙特马尼奥（大山）。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #3: Ex magnitudine montis (From the great mountain)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Eugene III (1145-1153). Born in Montemagno, Italy, a name meaning 'great mountain'. He served as abbot of the abbey of Tre Fontane near Pisa.
The motto 'From the great mountain' corresponds to the pope's birthplace of Montemagno (great mountain).
prophecies.verdict_zh: 尤金三世出生于蒙特马尼奥，地名直译为「大山」，与箴言精确对应。此条同属1595年前的箴言。
prophecies.verdict_en: Eugene III was born in Montemagno, literally meaning 'great mountain', matching the motto precisely. This motto also predates the 1595 publication.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第9条箴言：De Pannonia Tusciae（从匈牙利到托斯卡纳）
prophecies.a:
教皇乌尔巴诺四世（Urban IV，未对应此条）。实际对应教皇亚历山大四世之后的教皇——雅克·潘塔莱昂出身法国特鲁瓦。
白话：此条实际对应的教皇身份存在争议，传统上归于一位与匈牙利和托斯卡纳有关的教皇。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #9: De Pannonia Tusciae (From Pannonia to Tuscany)
prophecies.a_en:
This motto is traditionally linked to a pope connected to both Hungary (Pannonia) and Tuscany.
The attribution has been debated among scholars, as the exact correspondence is less clear than earlier mottos.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 该箴言的对应关系不如前几条明确。传统解释试图将其与教皇的家族徽章或出身地联系，但具体匹配存在争议。此条仍属1595年前的箴言。
prophecies.verdict_en: The correspondence for this motto is less clear than earlier entries. Traditional interpretations attempt to link it to the pope's coat of arms or birthplace, but the exact match is debated. Still predates the 1595 publication.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第40条箴言：De cruce Apostolica（来自使徒十字架）
prophecies.a:
教皇克莱孟六世（Clement VI，1342-1352在位）。原名皮埃尔·罗热，曾任圣十字架修道院院长，家族纹章中带有十字架图案。
白话：箴言「来自使徒十字架」与教皇的修道院背景和家族纹章相关。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #40: De cruce Apostolica (From the Apostolic Cross)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Clement VI (1342-1352). Born Pierre Roger, he served as prior of a Holy Cross monastery. His family coat of arms featured a cross.
The motto 'From the Apostolic Cross' relates to his monastic background and family heraldry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 克莱孟六世的修道院背景和家族纹章中的十字架图案与箴言吻合。此条属于1595年前的箴言，极可能为事后编写。
prophecies.verdict_en: Clement VI's monastic background and the cross in his family heraldry match the motto. This predates 1595 and was very likely composed retroactively.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第54条箴言：De cervo et leone（关于鹿和狮子）
prophecies.a:
教皇若望二十三世（对立教皇，1410-1415在位）。原名巴尔达萨雷·科萨。他出身那不勒斯，后在佛罗伦萨被废黜。传统解释认为鹿和狮子分别对应他教皇生涯中的两个关键城市的象征。
白话：箴言「关于鹿和狮子」被解读为对应教皇政治生涯中的动物纹章象征。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #54: De cervo et leone (Of the deer and the lion)
prophecies.a_en:
Antipope John XXIII (1410-1415). Born Baldassare Cossa. He was from Naples and later deposed in Florence. Traditional interpretation links the deer and lion to heraldic symbols of key cities in his papal career.
The motto 'Of the deer and the lion' is interpreted as referring to heraldic animal symbols in the antipope's political career.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 对立教皇若望二十三世的纹章解释有一定依据，但「鹿和狮子」的具体对应不够明确。这一时期的箴言仍在1595年出版之前。
prophecies.verdict_en: The heraldic interpretation for Antipope John XXIII has some basis, but the specific correspondence of 'deer and lion' is not entirely clear. This motto still predates the 1595 publication.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第70条箴言：Flos pilae aegrae（患病球柱之花）
prophecies.a:
教皇保禄三世（Paul III，1534-1549在位）。原名亚历山德罗·法尔内塞，法尔内塞家族纹章中有百合花（flos）图案。
白话：箴言中的「花」对应法尔内塞家族纹章中的百合花。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #70: Flos pilae aegrae (Flower of the sick ball/pillar)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Paul III (1534-1549). Born Alessandro Farnese. The Farnese family coat of arms featured fleur-de-lis (flowers).
The 'flower' in the motto corresponds to the fleur-de-lis in the Farnese family heraldry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 保禄三世出身法尔内塞家族，其家族纹章确实以六朵百合花为标志，「花」的对应明确。但「患病球柱」部分的解释较为牵强。此条为1595年前最晚期的箴言之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: Paul III was from the Farnese family whose coat of arms indeed features six fleur-de-lis, making the 'flower' correspondence clear. However, the 'sick ball/pillar' part is a stretch. This is among the latest pre-1595 mottos.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第76条箴言：Axis in medietate signi（标志中的轴线）
prophecies.a:
教皇西斯都五世（Sixtus V，1585-1590在位）。原名费利切·佩雷蒂。他的纹章中央有一条由狮子支撑的轴线横贯星形图案。这是1595年出版前后的关键箴言——西斯都五世去世于1590年，维翁于1595年出版。
白话：箴言「标志中的轴线」被认为对应教皇纹章中的轴线和星形图案。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #76: Axis in medietate signi (Axis in the middle of a sign)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Sixtus V (1585-1590). Born Felice Peretti. His coat of arms featured an axis supported by a lion across a star pattern. This is a critical motto near the 1595 publication date — Sixtus V died in 1590, and Wion published in 1595.
The motto 'Axis in the middle of a sign' is linked to the axis and star in the pope's heraldry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 西斯都五世的纹章确实包含轴线和星形图案。作为1590年去世的教皇，其箴言仍在1595年出版前的范围内，解释的精确度符合事后编写的模式。
prophecies.verdict_en: Sixtus V's coat of arms does include an axis and star motifs. As a pope who died in 1590, this motto falls within the pre-1595 range, and its precision fits the pattern of retroactive composition.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第78条箴言：De antiquitate urbis（关于城市的古老）
prophecies.a:
教皇乌尔巴诺七世（Urban VII，1590在位，仅13天）。原名詹巴蒂斯塔·卡斯塔尼亚，出生于罗马。这是1595年出版后第一批可验证的箴言之一。
白话：箴言「关于城市的古老」对应教皇出生于古城罗马。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #78: De antiquitate urbis (Of the antiquity of the city)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Urban VII (1590, only 13 days). Born Giambattista Castagna in Rome. This is among the first mottos that can be tested as post-1595 predictions.
The motto 'Of the antiquity of the city' corresponds to the pope being born in the ancient city of Rome.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 乌尔巴诺七世确实出生于罗马——最古老的城市之一。但他是1590年教皇选举的产物，而预言据信正是为这次选举而伪造的，因此此条的「准确」恰好支持伪造说。
prophecies.verdict_en: Urban VII was indeed born in Rome — one of the most ancient cities. However, he was elected in the 1590 conclave, and the prophecy is believed to have been fabricated precisely for that election, so this motto's 'accuracy' actually supports the forgery hypothesis.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第85条箴言：Aquila rapax（贪婪的鹰）
prophecies.a:
教皇克莱孟十二世的继任者？传统上对应教皇庇护七世（Pius VII，1800-1823在位），他在位期间被拿破仑囚禁。「贪婪的鹰」被解读为拿破仑的象征——鹰是拿破仑帝国的标志。
白话：箴言「贪婪的鹰」被广泛解读为指向拿破仑，而非教皇本人。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #85: Aquila rapax (Rapacious eagle)
prophecies.a_en:
Traditionally linked to Pope Pius VII (1800-1823), who was imprisoned by Napoleon. The 'rapacious eagle' is interpreted as Napoleon — the eagle was the symbol of the Napoleonic Empire.
The motto 'Rapacious eagle' is widely interpreted as referring to Napoleon rather than the pope himself.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护七世确实在拿破仑统治期间被囚禁（1809-1814），鹰也确实是拿破仑帝国的象征。但箴言本应描述教皇而非其对手，解释方向被扭转。作为1595年后的箴言，其匹配依赖于灵活的解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius VII was indeed imprisoned by Napoleon (1809-1814), and the eagle was Napoleon's imperial symbol. However, the motto should describe the pope, not his adversary — the interpretation is inverted. As a post-1595 motto, the match relies on flexible reading.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第88条箴言：Crux de cruce（十字架中的十字架）
prophecies.a:
教皇庇护九世（Pius IX，1846-1878在位）。在位时间为天主教史上最长的确认教皇任期（31年7个月）。他在位期间意大利统一运动剥夺了教皇国的世俗领土，被迫成为「梵蒂冈的囚徒」。
白话：箴言「十字架中的十字架」被解读为教皇因十字架（信仰）而背负十字架（苦难）——失去教皇国领土是他的十字架。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #88: Crux de cruce (Cross from a cross)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Pius IX (1846-1878). His pontificate was the longest confirmed in Catholic history (31 years, 7 months). During his reign, the Italian unification movement stripped the Papal States of temporal territory, making him the 'Prisoner of the Vatican'.
The motto 'Cross from a cross' is interpreted as the pope bearing a cross (suffering) because of the cross (faith) — losing the Papal States was his great trial.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护九世确实经历了教皇国领土丧失的巨大磨难。但「十字架中的十字架」的解读相当灵活——几乎任何受苦的教皇都可以套用。作为1595年后数百年的箴言，匹配依赖主观解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius IX did suffer the loss of the Papal States. However, 'Cross from a cross' is a highly flexible interpretation — almost any pope who suffered could fit. As a motto centuries after 1595, the match depends on subjective reading.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第89条箴言：Lumen in caelo（天上的光）
prophecies.a:
教皇良十三世（Leo XIII，1878-1903在位）。原名乔阿基诺·佩奇。其家族纹章上有一颗带光芒的星星（彗星），被解读为「天上的光」。
白话：箴言「天上的光」对应教皇家族纹章中的彗星/星星图案。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #89: Lumen in caelo (Light in the sky)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Leo XIII (1878-1903). Born Gioacchino Pecci. His family coat of arms featured a comet/shooting star, interpreted as the 'light in the sky'.
The motto 'Light in the sky' corresponds to the comet/star in the pope's family heraldry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 良十三世的家族纹章确实有彗星图案，与「天上的光」有一定对应。但纹章中有星星的教皇家族并不罕见，匹配程度中等。
prophecies.verdict_en: Leo XIII's family heraldry did feature a comet, providing some correspondence with 'light in the sky'. However, stars in papal family heraldry are not uncommon, so the match is moderate.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第90条箴言：Ignis ardens（燃烧的火焰）
prophecies.a:
教皇庇护十世（Pius X，1903-1914在位）。原名朱塞佩·梅尔基奥雷·萨尔托。他以极大的热情推动天主教改革，包括反对现代主义运动、改革教会音乐和提倡频繁领圣体。
白话：箴言「燃烧的火焰」被解读为对应教皇推行改革的狂热精力。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #90: Ignis ardens (Burning fire)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Pius X (1903-1914). Born Giuseppe Melchiorre Sarto. Known for his zealous reform of the Catholic Church, including his anti-modernist campaign, reform of sacred music, and promotion of frequent communion.
The motto 'Burning fire' is interpreted as reflecting the pope's passionate energy for reform.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护十世确以改革热情著称，但「燃烧的火焰」过于笼统——几乎任何有魄力的教皇都可套用。后1595年箴言的典型模糊匹配。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius X was indeed known for reformist zeal, but 'burning fire' is too generic — almost any energetic pope could fit. A typical vague match for a post-1595 motto.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第91条箴言：Religio depopulata（被毁灭的宗教）
prophecies.a:
教皇本笃十五世（Benedict XV，1914-1922在位）。原名贾科莫·德拉·基耶萨。他的任期几乎完全笼罩在第一次世界大战中，战争造成了基督教国家之间的空前杀戮。
白话：箴言「被毁灭的宗教」对应一战期间基督教世界的自相残杀和信仰危机。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #91: Religio depopulata (Religion depopulated/destroyed)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Benedict XV (1914-1922). Born Giacomo della Chiesa. His pontificate was almost entirely overshadowed by World War I, which caused unprecedented slaughter among Christian nations.
The motto 'Religion depopulated' corresponds to the mutual destruction of Christian nations during WWI and the resulting crisis of faith.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 本笃十五世任期确实与一战重叠，基督教国家间的大规模杀戮可以解读为「宗教被毁灭」。但这一解读将历史事件而非教皇个人特征与箴言挂钩，属于灵活解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: Benedict XV's pontificate did overlap with WWI, and the mass slaughter among Christian nations can be read as 'religion depopulated'. However, this links a historical event rather than a personal trait to the motto — a flexible interpretation.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第92条箴言：Fides intrepida（无畏的信仰）
prophecies.a:
教皇庇护十一世（Pius XI，1922-1939在位）。原名阿基莱·拉蒂。他在任内签署了《拉特兰条约》（1929年），并发布通谕《在燃烧的忧虑中》（Mit brennender Sorge，1937年）公开谴责纳粹主义。
白话：箴言「无畏的信仰」对应教皇敢于公开对抗法西斯主义和纳粹主义。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #92: Fides intrepida (Intrepid faith)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Pius XI (1922-1939). Born Achille Ratti. He signed the Lateran Treaty (1929) and issued the encyclical Mit brennender Sorge (1937) openly condemning Nazism.
The motto 'Intrepid faith' corresponds to the pope's courage in openly confronting fascism and Nazism.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护十一世确实公开谴责纳粹主义，展现了一定的「无畏」。但他也与墨索里尼签订了《拉特兰条约》，对法西斯意大利的态度更为复杂。箴言的匹配有选择性。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius XI did openly condemn Nazism, showing some 'intrepidity'. However, he also signed the Lateran Treaty with Mussolini, and his stance toward Fascist Italy was more complex. The motto match is selective.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第93条箴言：Pastor angelicus（天使般的牧人）
prophecies.a:
教皇庇护十二世（Pius XII，1939-1958在位）。原名尤金尼奥·帕切利。他在二战期间领导天主教会，其对犹太人大屠杀的态度至今仍有争议。「天使般的牧人」是对这位教皇最著名的箴言之一。
白话：箴言「天使般的牧人」在教皇当选前就广为流传，甚至影响了选举。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #93: Pastor angelicus (Angelic shepherd)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Pius XII (1939-1958). Born Eugenio Pacelli. He led the Catholic Church during WWII, and his stance on the Holocaust remains controversial. 'Angelic shepherd' is one of the most famous mottos in the prophecy.
The motto 'Angelic shepherd' was widely known before the pope's election and may have influenced the conclave.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护十二世的支持者视他为圣洁的牧人，但批评者指责他对大屠杀保持沉默。值得注意的是，这条箴言在选举前就广为人知，可能产生了自我实现效应——选民可能倾向选出一位「看起来像天使般牧人」的候选人。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius XII's supporters view him as a holy shepherd, but critics accuse him of silence during the Holocaust. Notably, this motto was widely known before the election, potentially creating a self-fulfilling effect — electors may have favored a candidate who appeared 'angelic'.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第94条箴言：Pastor et nauta（牧人与水手）
prophecies.a:
教皇若望二十三世（John XXIII，1958-1963在位）。原名安杰洛·朱塞佩·龙卡利。他曾任威尼斯宗主教（威尼斯=水城=水手），并召集了第二次梵蒂冈大公会议，被誉为教会的伟大牧人。
白话：箴言「牧人与水手」对应教皇的威尼斯宗主教（水手）身份和大公会议召集者（牧人）角色。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #94: Pastor et nauta (Shepherd and sailor)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope John XXIII (1958-1963). Born Angelo Giuseppe Roncalli. He was Patriarch of Venice (Venice = water city = sailor) and convened the Second Vatican Council, earning him the title of a great shepherd of the Church.
The motto 'Shepherd and sailor' corresponds to his role as Patriarch of Venice (sailor) and convener of Vatican II (shepherd).
prophecies.verdict_zh: 若望二十三世确实曾任威尼斯宗主教（水手=水城），又以召集梵二会议引领教会（牧人），两个意象都有明确对应。这是1595年后箴言中匹配度最高的之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: John XXIII was indeed Patriarch of Venice (sailor = water city) and led the Church by convening Vatican II (shepherd). Both images have clear correspondences. This is one of the best matches among post-1595 mottos.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第95条箴言：Flos florum（花中之花）
prophecies.a:
教皇保禄六世（Paul VI，1963-1978在位）。原名乔瓦尼·巴蒂斯塔·蒙蒂尼。其家族纹章中有三朵百合花（鸢尾花），百合被称为「花中之花」。
白话：箴言「花中之花」对应教皇家族纹章中的百合花/鸢尾花图案。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #95: Flos florum (Flower of flowers)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Paul VI (1963-1978). Born Giovanni Battista Montini. His family coat of arms featured three fleurs-de-lis (irises), and the lily is called the 'flower of flowers'.
The motto 'Flower of flowers' corresponds to the fleurs-de-lis in the pope's family heraldry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 保禄六世的蒙蒂尼家族纹章确实有三朵百合花/鸢尾花，「花中之花」的对应较为明确。
prophecies.verdict_en: Paul VI's Montini family heraldry does feature three fleurs-de-lis, making the 'flower of flowers' correspondence fairly clear.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第96条箴言：De medietate lunae（半月）
prophecies.a:
教皇若望保禄一世（John Paul I，1978年在位，仅33天）。原名阿尔比诺·卢恰尼。他于1978年8月26日当选（月亮渐盈），9月28日去世（月亮渐亏），任期恰好跨越了一个月相周期的一半。
白话：箴言「半月」被解读为教皇仅在位约一个月（半个月相周期），也暗示他如月亮般短暂升起又陨落。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #96: De medietate lunae (Of the half moon)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope John Paul I (1978, only 33 days). Born Albino Luciani. He was elected on August 26, 1978 (waxing moon) and died on September 28 (waning moon), his pontificate spanning roughly half a lunar cycle.
The motto 'Of the half moon' is interpreted as referring to his roughly one-month pontificate (half a lunar cycle), suggesting he rose and fell like the moon.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 若望保禄一世的33天任期是教皇史上最短之一，「半月」的时间隐喻有一定道理。但月亮意象过于灵活，可以从多角度解读。他的突然去世至今仍有阴谋论。
prophecies.verdict_en: John Paul I's 33-day pontificate is among the shortest in papal history, giving the 'half moon' temporal metaphor some merit. However, the lunar imagery is highly flexible and open to multiple interpretations. His sudden death remains the subject of conspiracy theories.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第97条箴言：De labore Solis（太阳的劳作）
prophecies.a:
教皇若望保禄二世（John Paul II，1978-2005在位）。原名卡罗尔·约泽夫·沃伊蒂瓦，出生于波兰。他出生当天（1920年5月18日）和下葬当天（2005年4月8日）都发生了日食现象。「太阳的劳作」在中世纪拉丁语中也指日食。
白话：箴言「太阳的劳作」被解读为教皇出生和下葬时的日食巧合，也暗指他在全球范围内不知疲倦的牧职工作。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #97: De labore Solis (Of the labor/eclipse of the Sun)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope John Paul II (1978-2005). Born Karol Jozef Wojtyla in Poland. Solar eclipses occurred on both his birthday (May 18, 1920) and the day of his funeral (April 8, 2005). 'Labor of the Sun' (labore Solis) also means 'solar eclipse' in medieval Latin.
The motto 'Of the labor of the Sun' is interpreted as the solar eclipse coincidences at his birth and funeral, and also alludes to his tireless global ministry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 若望保禄二世出生日（1920年5月18日）有日偏食可见于欧洲南部，下葬日（2005年4月8日）有日环食-日全食混合型日食。两个日食巧合是这条箴言最引人注目的对应。他也是历史上旅行最多的教皇，「太阳的劳作」亦可解读为不懈的工作。
prophecies.verdict_en: A partial solar eclipse visible from southern Europe occurred on John Paul II's birthday (May 18, 1920), and a hybrid annular-total solar eclipse occurred on his funeral day (April 8, 2005). These two eclipse coincidences are the most striking match for this motto. He was also the most-traveled pope in history, and 'labor of the Sun' can also be read as tireless work.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第98条箴言：Gloria olivae（橄榄的荣耀）
prophecies.a:
教皇本笃十六世（Benedict XVI，2005-2013在位）。原名约瑟夫·阿洛伊斯·拉青格，来自德国。他选择「本笃」作为教皇名号，而本笃会（Benedictine Order）的别称正是「橄榄会」（Olivetans）。
白话：箴言「橄榄的荣耀」通过教皇名号「本笃」与本笃会的别称「橄榄会」建立联系。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #98: Gloria olivae (Glory of the olive)
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Benedict XVI (2005-2013). Born Joseph Alois Ratzinger from Germany. He chose 'Benedict' as his papal name, and the Benedictine Order has a branch known as the Olivetans (Order of Our Lady of Mount Olivet).
The motto 'Glory of the olive' is connected through the papal name 'Benedict' to the Benedictine Order's Olivetan branch.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 本笃十六世选择「本笃」为教皇名号，本笃会确有「橄榄会」分支，但拉青格本人并非本笃会修士。联系是间接的：教皇名号→修会→分支别称→橄榄。此外，预言的自我实现效应不容忽视——拉青格选择名号时可能受到了箴言的影响。
prophecies.verdict_en: Benedict XVI chose 'Benedict' as his papal name, and the Benedictine Order does have an Olivetan branch. However, Ratzinger was not himself a Benedictine monk. The connection is indirect: papal name → order → branch nickname → olive. Moreover, the self-fulfilling prophecy effect cannot be ignored — Ratzinger may have been influenced by the motto when choosing his name.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 第99条（或终篇）：现任教皇方济各
prophecies.a:
教皇方济各（Francis，2013年至今在位）。原名豪尔赫·马里奥·贝尔格里奥，来自阿根廷。按照预言列表，第112条（最后一条）是「罗马人伯多禄」（Petrus Romanus），而方济各在列表中的位置引发了激烈争论：有人认为他是第112位教皇即最后一位，有人认为预言在第111条后有缺失。
白话：方济各是否为预言中的「最后一位教皇」是当代最大的争论焦点。
prophecies.q_en: Motto #99 (or finale): Current Pope Francis
prophecies.a_en:
Pope Francis (2013-present). Born Jorge Mario Bergoglio from Argentina. According to the prophecy list, the 112th and final entry is 'Peter the Roman' (Petrus Romanus). Francis's position in the list has sparked fierce debate: some argue he is the 112th and last pope, while others believe the list has gaps after #111.
Whether Francis is the prophesied 'last pope' is the most debated contemporary question.
prophecies.yearReason: 根据教皇预言的序列推算，该条对应此时期的教皇
prophecies.yearReason_en: Based on the sequential order of the Prophecy of the Popes, this entry corresponds to the pope of this era

prophecies.q: 终篇箴言：Petrus Romanus（罗马人伯多禄）
prophecies.a:
「在圣教会遭受最后的迫害时，罗马人伯多禄将登上教皇宝座。他将在诸多磨难中牧养羊群。当这些事完成时，七丘之城将被摧毁，可畏的审判者将审判万民。终。」
这是预言列表的最后一条，也是唯一附有长篇说明的条目。它不仅预言了最后一位教皇的身份，还预言了罗马城的毁灭和末日审判。
白话：最终箴言描述了一位名叫「伯多禄」的罗马教皇将在末日迫害中领导教会，随后罗马被毁，世界末日来临。
prophecies.q_en: Final motto: Petrus Romanus (Peter the Roman)
prophecies.a_en:
"In the final persecution of the Holy Roman Church, there will sit Peter the Roman, who will pasture his sheep in many tribulations. When these things are finished, the city of seven hills will be destroyed, and the dreadful Judge will judge his people. The End."
This is the final entry in the prophecy list and the only one with a lengthy description. It prophesies not only the identity of the last pope but also the destruction of Rome and the Last Judgment.
The final motto describes a pope named 'Peter' from Rome who will lead the Church through end-times persecution, after which Rome is destroyed and the world ends.
